title: Hornet Removal in Throgs Neck, Bronx | $350 - $550

intro: Hornets pose a serious threat to residents and visitors in Throgs Neck, especially during warmer months when nests grow larger near waterfront properties and residential areas. Best Pest Control NYC provides fast, safe hornet removal services throughout this peninsular Bronx neighborhood, protecting families from aggressive stings. Our licensed technicians safely eliminate nests from homes, marinas, and commercial properties for $350 - $550.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Throgs Neck for years, understanding the unique challenges of hornet infestations in this waterfront community. Our experienced team uses safe, effective removal methods and offers same-day emergency service to protect your family and property from these aggressive pests.
localContext: Throgs Neck's proximity to the East River and Long Island Sound, along with its tree-lined streets and mix of single-family homes and co-op buildings, creates ideal conditions for hornet nesting. From properties near Fort Schuyler to homes along Pennyfield Avenue and the Throgs Neck Bridge area, we've successfully removed hornets from eaves, attics, porches, and outdoor structures throughout this tight-knit waterfront neighborhood.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Throgs Neck?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and emergency hornet removal service in Throgs Neck. Most nest removals are completed within 1-2 hours, depending on nest size and location. We prioritize urgent cases where hornets pose immediate danger to children, pets, or high-traffic areas.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350 - $550 hornet removal service?
faqs.answer: Our service includes complete inspection, safe nest removal using professional-grade equipment, treatment of the area to prevent re-nesting, debris cleanup, and a follow-up guarantee. Price varies based on nest size, location accessibility, and height requiring specialized equipment.

faqs.question: Are hornets common near the waterfront areas of Throgs Neck?
faqs.answer: Yes, hornets thrive in Throgs Neck due to the waterfront environment, abundant vegetation, and mixture of residential properties. They often build nests in eaves, soffits, trees, and sheds. The maritime climate and green spaces near the East River provide ideal conditions for hornet colonies to establish and grow.

faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our licensed technicians use EPA-approved products and proven safety protocols to eliminate hornets without endangering your family or pets. We secure the area during treatment, wear protective gear, and ensure all hornets are eliminated before declaring the area safe for normal use.
